summary.title: LOW RISK - Satirical Personal Account
key_findings: Account appears to be satirical/humorous based on display name 'Known Scammer'
Account age: 8+ years (December 2017) indicates legitimate personal use
Low follower count (13) with high following (315) suggests personal account, not promotional
Bio 'Sarcasm over smarts' and location 'wouldn't you like to know' indicate humor
Last activity was in 2018 - account is inactive/dormant
No promotional content, no DM solicitations, no crypto scams detected

summary.notes: The display name 'Known Scammer' appears to be intentionally ironic/satirical. The account shows no signs of actual scamming behavior - no promotional posts, no DM solicitations, no unrealistic claims. The account has been inactive since 2018 and appears to be a dormant personal account that was used for crypto discussion.
